src/lib/entity-commands.test.ts:53

Error: Argument of type '{ onInspect: Mock<Procedure>; onDismiss: () => boolean; }' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Attributes & InspectProviderProps'.
Property 'children' is missing.

Fix: add children to the props object in createElement call, or use a different signature.
Fix TypeScript error in entity-commands.test.ts - missing children prop in createElement call
